shared_rules.hatch_consistency: Use the official Hatch mascot reference as the source of truth.

assets.hatch_variant: pointing narrator integrated into story scene
assets.alt: Hatch composing a message on a laptop with the Hacker News orange logo visible in the background, illustrating Slack's launch announcement.
assets.caption: Hatch composing a message on a laptop with the Hacker News orange logo visible in the background, illustrating Slack's launch announcement.
assets.prompt: Slack's Hacker News Launch | hero: Hatch mascot (the HackProduct robot with the graduation cap and growth arrow) sitting at a laptop, composing a message — the screen shows a simple text field and the Hacker News orange logo in the background. Hatch's expression is calm and deliberate, not excited. The scene reads as a thoughtful announcement, not a press moment. Cream background, no speech bubble. HackProduct watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 2400x1350. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression. No exact logos, no fake screenshots, no real person likenesses, no implied company endorsement. Do not include a watermark in the generated source because watermarking is applied after approval.
assets.crop_notes: Center-cover crop checked against role safe zone.
qa: Official Hatch reference required by prompt and manifest.
Watermark applied in post-processing.
No exact logos, fake screenshots, real person likenesses, or implied endorsement.

assets.alt: Hatch examining a diagram comparing a press launch reaching a wide crowd versus an HN post reaching a small, engaged group of beta testers.
assets.caption: Hatch examining a diagram comparing a press launch reaching a wide crowd versus an HN post reaching a small, engaged group of beta testers.
assets.prompt: Slack's Hacker News Launch | failure-mechanism: Hatch in thinking pose, looking at a simple two-column diagram: on the left, a "press launch" box with thin arrows pointing to a crowd of tiny indistinct figures; on the right, an "HN post" box with thick arrows pointing to a small group of clearly engaged figures holding notepads. The point is feedback density versus reach breadth. Cream background. HackProduct watermark bottom-right, 60% opacity, JetBrains Mono. Aspect 1800x1200. Use case: illustration-story. Use the official Hatch mascot as a strict character reference, not as a pasted sticker. Preserve Hatch's rounded green head frame, cream face/body, graduation cap, growth arrow, H chest mark, bright eyes, mitten hands, and friendly coach expression.
